brief.title: Should the built-in demo write to Firebase?
brief.objective: Demonstrate the fixed-round protocol using the accepted local-only Demo boundary.
questions: Should the built-in Demo write to Firebase?

knownFacts: The built-in Demo is local-only and read-only.
The Demo is not added to myTrips.
These contributions are synthetic and were not produced by external Agents.

constraints: Do not treat fixture responses as real Agent records.

execution.reason: AI-3A packets are import-only and never execute an external Agent.
